Title: Job role router protects list endpoint with authorize
Test Steps: 1. Import jobRoleRouter; 2. Inspect GET /job-roles registration; 3. Verify authorize middleware is attached
Test Data: Input: route=/job-roles; Technique: Decision Tables

Title: Job role router protects detailed endpoint with authorize
Test Steps: 1. Import jobRoleRouter; 2. Inspect GET /job-roles/:id registration; 3. Verify authorize middleware attached
Test Data: Input: route=/job-roles/:id; Technique: Decision Tables

Title: Job role controller list returns 200 and payload
Test Steps: 1. Invoke getJobRoles controller method; 2. Inspect response
Test Data: Mock: getJobRoles returns 1+ rows; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role controller list forwards service errors
Test Steps: 1. Invoke getJobRoles controller method; 2. Assert next called with error
Expected Results: Error is propagated to next middleware
Test Data: Mock: throws Error(service failed); Technique: Error Guessing

Title: Job role controller detail rejects non integer id
Test Steps: 1. Call detailed endpoint with id=abc; 2. Inspect response
Test Data: Input: params.id=abc; Technique: Equivalence Partitioning

Title: Job role controller detail rejects decimal id
Test Steps: 1. Call detailed endpoint with id=1.5; 2. Inspect response
Test Data: Input: params.id=1.5; Technique: Equivalence Partitioning

Title: Job role controller detail rejects scientific notation id
Test Steps: 1. Call detailed endpoint with id=1e2; 2. Inspect response
Test Data: Input: params.id=1e2; Technique: Equivalence Partitioning

Title: Job role controller detail rejects zero and negative ids
Test Steps: 1. Call detailed endpoint with id=0 and id=-1; 2. Inspect response
Expected Results: Returns 400 Invalid job role id for each
Test Data: Input: params.id=0; params.id=-1; Technique: Equivalence Partitioning

Title: Job role controller detail rejects unsafe integer range
Test Steps: 1. Call detailed endpoint with id=9007199254740993; 2. Inspect response
Test Data: Input: params.id=9007199254740993; Technique: Boundary Value Analysis

Title: Job role controller detail returns 200 when found
Test Steps: 1. Invoke detailed endpoint with valid id; 2. Inspect response
Expected Results: Returns 200 with detailed job role payload
Test Data: Mock: JobRoleDetailedResponse returns object; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role controller detail returns 404 when missing
Test Steps: 1. Invoke detailed endpoint with valid id; 2. Inspect response
Test Data: Mock: JobRoleDetailedResponse returns null; Technique: Risk Based Testing

Title: Job role controller detail forwards service errors
Test Steps: 1. Invoke detailed endpoint; 2. Assert next called with error
Test Data: Mock: throws Error(service failed); Technique: Error Guessing

Title: Job role DAO retrieves ordered records with relations
Test Steps: 1. Mock findMany records; 2. Call getJobRoles; 3. Inspect Prisma query and output mapping
Expected Results: findMany uses orderBy id asc with include capability and band; mapped entities returned
Test Data: Mock: findMany returns joined entities; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role DAO converts closingDate string to Date in list
Test Steps: 1. Mock findMany closingDate as ISO string; 2. Call getJobRoles; 3. Inspect type/value
Test Data: Mock: closingDate=2026-09-15T10:30:00.000Z; Technique: Equivalence Partitioning

Title: Job role DAO preserves Date closingDate in list
Test Steps: 1. Mock findMany closingDate as Date; 2. Call getJobRoles; 3. Inspect timestamp
Test Data: Mock: closingDate=Date(2026-10-01T12:00:00.000Z); Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role DAO normalizes nullable optional fields in list
Test Steps: 1. Mock findMany sharepointUrl and numberOfOpenPositions as null; 2. Call getJobRoles
Expected Results: Mapped output uses undefined for nullable optionals
Test Data: Mock: sharepointUrl=null; numberOfOpenPositions=null; Technique: Boundary Value Analysis

Title: Job role DAO rethrows Prisma findMany error
Test Steps: 1. Mock findMany throwing error; 2. Call getJobRoles; 3. Assert rejection
Test Data: Mock: Error(db unavailable); Technique: Error Guessing

Title: Job role DAO detailed returns mapped object when found
Test Steps: 1. Mock findUnique with relation fields; 2. Call JobRoleDetailedResponse; 3. Assert mapped output
Expected Results: Returns JobRole with capabilityName and bandName
Test Data: Input: id=1; Mock: findUnique result; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role DAO detailed returns null when missing
Test Steps: 1. Call JobRoleDetailedResponse with missing id; 2. Inspect result
Test Data: Input: id=999; Technique: Risk Based Testing

Title: Job role DAO detailed converts string date to Date
Test Steps: 1. Mock findUnique closingDate as string; 2. Call JobRoleDetailedResponse; 3. Inspect type/value
Test Data: Mock: closingDate=2026-09-01T00:00:00.000Z; Technique: Equivalence Partitioning

Title: Job role mapper maps single role to response projection
Test Steps: 1. Call toResponse with full JobRole; 2. Compare output fields
Expected Results: Returns response projection expected by API list
Test Data: Input: JobRole with capabilityName and bandName; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role mapper maps array via toResponses
Test Steps: 1. Call toResponses with two roles; 2. Inspect output length and order
Expected Results: Each record mapped using toResponse preserving order
Test Data: Input: readonly JobRole[] with 2 records; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role mapper returns empty list for no records
Test Steps: 1. Call toResponses with empty array; 2. Inspect result
Test Data: Input: []; Technique: Boundary Value Analysis

Title: Job role mapper detailed projection includes optional fields
Test Steps: 1. Call JobRoleDetailedResponse with full JobRole; 2. Inspect fields
Expected Results: Returns detailed response containing description responsibilities optional fields
Test Data: Input: JobRole with sharepointUrl and numberOfOpenPositions; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role service list calls DAO then mapper
Preconditions: DAO and mapper test doubles configured
Test Steps: 1. Call service.getJobRoles; 2. Assert DAO invocation; 3. Assert mapper invocation and output
Expected Results: Delegates to DAO and mapper exactly once
Test Data: Mock: dao.getJobRoles and mapper.toResponses spies; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role service list rethrows DAO errors
Test Steps: 1. Mock dao.getJobRoles rejection; 2. Call service.getJobRoles; 3. Assert same error
Expected Results: Service does not swallow DAO errors
Test Data: Mock: Error(dao failure); Technique: Error Guessing

Title: Job role service detail maps DAO object when present
Test Steps: 1. Mock dao.JobRoleDetailedResponse returns role; 2. Call service detail method; 3. Assert mapper called
Test Data: Input: id=1; Mock: role object; Technique: Use Case Testing

Title: Job role service detail returns null without mapper call
Test Steps: 1. Mock dao detail returns null; 2. Call service detail; 3. Assert mapper not called
Test Data: Input: id=999; Technique: Risk Based Testing

Title: End to end admin and user can access job role endpoints
Preconditions: Valid JWTs for both roles; seeded users exist
Test Steps: 1. Login as user and admin; 2. Call GET /job-roles and /job-roles/1 for each; 3. Verify status
Expected Results: Both roles receive successful responses as allowed roles
Test Data: Input: JWT role=user and role=admin; Technique: Decision Tables
